test.details: 167 repo tests passed, 137 browser-use-discovery tests passed

featureReviews.summary: Two-layer guardrail (UI-level + defense-in-depth) correctly blocks blank-intent runs, surfaces AI Suggester guidance, prevents webhook emission. No automated tests (UI-only limitation documented per skill guidance). Manual browser verification confirms expected behavior.

issues.description: No automated tests added for UI-only guardrail - limitation documented per skill guidance

featureReviews.summary: Request-authoritative intent validation correctly rejects blank/missing intent with explicit 400 errors and AI Suggester guidance. No stored-profile fallback exists. 6 new tests + 7 CROSS-area tests updated. All pass.

NAVIGATION_TITLE_DENYLIST rejects 40+ junk phrases. Both dedupe functions use (title, company) multi-signal identity instead of URL-only. 4 new tests cover VAL-DATA-006 and VAL-DATA-007. All 304 tests pass.
